{{Quote|This Rebellion against the Empire must be crushed—it will be crushed... that is why we eradicated all life on the planet Telfrey—to make an example of what happened to those who oppose us...|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]|<ref name="marvel76">[[Star Wars (1977) 76|''Star Wars'' (1977) 76]]</ref>}}
'''Telfrey''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Trans-Nebular sector/Legends|Trans-Nebular sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> that was home to a native [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] called the [[Telfreyan]]s, and also supported a population of [[Human/Legends|Humans]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]]. Among the Humans who called Telfrey home were [[Tay Vanis]] and [[Yom Argo]], who later left home to serve the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] as [[Spy/Legends|spies]]. Vanis and Argo later returned to Telfrey to investigate reports of increased [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] activity in the region, and eventually Telfrey erupted in open rebellion. The Imperial response was swift and brutal, and the ensuing [[Decimation of Telfrey|bombardment]] rendered the planet completely uninhabitable.<ref name="marvel74" /> During the [[Nagai–Tof War]], the [[Tof/Legends|Tofs]] established a heavily fortified base on Telfrey's surface.<ref name="tofs">{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/nagai11202009/index.html|text=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs|int=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs}}</ref>
